summary: Good‑energy show with strong second set and solid UltraMatrix mix
review: The reviewer finds the concert well‑inspired, highlighting a punchy first‑set opener and an especially vibrant second set that includes standout versions of Scarlet Begonias, Fire on the Mountain, Estimated Prophet → Eyes of the World, and an emotional Standing on the Moon. No specific recording complaints are made, suggesting the UltraMatrix (matrix) source is listenable.

ai_rating.rationale: One detailed review praises the musical performance heavily and gives no technical criticism; rating reflects strong show quality with an assumed decent matrix recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on sound issues; reviewer does not mention any flaws, implying a satisfactory mix.

standout_songs: Estimated Prophet → Eyes of the World
show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as standard but well‑played; second set praised for its energy, seamless transitions and a strong jam leading into Fire on the Mountain.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Positive remarks about his solos and especially his vocals, noted as some of the best of ’89‑’90.
band_member_comments.Drums: Mentioned that the drummers were using larger drums for a bigger sound, typical of ’89.
